activities_projects.title: Psychological Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the psychological traits of the intruder
steps: Write a paragraph explaining his mindset

activities_projects.title: Dramatic Structure Study
steps: Identify exposition, rising action, climax and resolution
Write them with examples from the play

activities_projects.title: Theme Essay
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the theme of intelligence over violence
steps: Explain how Gerrard defeats the intruder using intelligence
Write a paragraph about the theme

activities_projects.title: Alternative Ending
steps: Imagine a different ending for the play

activities_projects.title: Character Evaluation
steps: Write a paragraph explaining why Gerrard can be considered a hero

activities_projects.title: Symbolism Exploration
activities_projects.objective: Identify symbolic elements in the play
steps: Find objects or actions that symbolise deeper meaning

activities_projects.title: Intruder’s Perspective Writing
activities_projects.objective: Write from another character’s point of view
steps: Write a diary entry describing the events

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Transformation
activities_projects.objective: Convert drama dialogue into narrative form
steps: Choose a dialogue from the play
Rewrite it as a narrative paragraph

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Application
activities_projects.objective: Relate the play’s theme to real life
steps: Write a paragraph explaining how intelligence can solve real-life problems

activities_projects.title: Short Critical Review
steps: Write a short review of the play
Mention what you liked and what message it gives
